## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Traceability

- Closes #<!-- issue number -->
- OpenSpec change: `<!-- change-name -->`
- OpenSpec tasks completed: `<!-- task ids -->`

## Validation

- [ ] `make secrets`
- [ ] `make artifacts`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make docs`
- [ ] `openspec validate <change-name>`

## Data and Operations

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, full county releases, or protected records are included.
- [ ] Any artifact allowlist change is narrow, synthetic or redistribution-safe, and justified here.
- [ ] Schema, backfill, migration, and rollback effects are documented or not applicable.
- [ ] County source provenance and fixture redistribution are documented or not applicable.
